revision.text:
{{神社| 名称=鞆結神社・大荒比古神社| 所在地=滋賀県高島市マキノ町浦627| 祭神=豊城入彦命
大荒田別命　外| 社格=式内社
郷社| 創建=仲哀天皇御宇| 例祭=[[4月19日]]| 神事=}} '''鞆結神社・大荒比古神社'''（ともゆいじんじゃ・おおあらひこじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町浦に鎮座する神社である。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに[[式内社]]の[[論社]]である。旧社格は郷社。 ==ご祭神== *鞆結神社 **[[大己貴命]] **[[須勢理姫命]] **[[須佐之男命]] *大荒比古神社 **[[豊城入彦命]] **[[大荒田別命]] **[[誉田別命]] ==ご神紋== 鍬形 ==歴史== 社伝によると、[[仲哀天皇]]の御宇に創建されたと伝わる。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに[[式内社]]論社である。鞆結郷の惣社である。旧郷社。 ==祭事== 例祭　　4月19日 == 関連項目 == *[[神道]] *[[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:ともゆいしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:高島市]] [[Category:式内社]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{神社| 名称=鞆結神社・大荒比古神社| 所在地=滋賀県高島市マキノ町浦627| 祭神=豊城入彦命
大荒田別命　外| 社格=式内社
郷社| 創建=仲哀天皇御宇| 例祭=[[4月19日]]| 神事=}} '''鞆結神社・大荒比古神社'''（ともゆいじんじゃ・おおあらひこじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町浦に鎮座する神社である。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに[[式内社]]の[[論社]]である。旧社格は郷社。 ==ご祭神== *鞆結神社 **[[大己貴命]] **[[須勢理姫命]] **[[須佐之男命]] *大荒比古神社 **[[豊城入彦命]] **[[大荒田別命]] **[[誉田別命]] ==ご神紋== 鍬形 ==歴史== 社伝によると、[[仲哀天皇]]の御宇に創建されたと伝わる。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに[[式内社]]論社である。鞆結郷の惣社である。旧郷社。 ==祭事== 例祭　　4月19日 == 関連項目 == *[[神道]] *[[神社]] {{DEFAULTSORT:ともゆいしんしや}} [[Category:滋賀県の神社]] [[Category:高島市]] [[Category:式内小社]] {{Shinto-stub}}

revision.comment: 微改と微々加筆
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:T-tomoyui-jinja.JPG|center|250px]]本殿（奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = 滋賀県高島市マキノ町浦627 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|23.1|N|136|03|40.9|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = （大荒比古神社）豊城入彦命・大荒田別命 外
（鞆結神社）誉田別命 |社格 = 式内社論社・旧郷社 |創建 = 伝仲哀天皇朝 |本殿 = [[流造|三間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月19日 |神事 = }} '''鞆結神社・大荒比古神社'''（ともゆいじんじゃ・おおあらひこじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町浦に鎮座する[[神社]]である。大荒比古神社と鞆結神社の2神社が併記の形で[[合祀]]されているが、ともに[[式内社]]の[[論社]]とされる。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。 == 祭神 == ;大荒比古神社 :*[[豊城入彦命]] :*[[大荒田別命]] :*[[大己貴命]] :*[[須勢理姫命]] :*配祀神 [[須佐男命]]・[[菅原道真公]] ;鞆結神社 :*[[誉田別命]] == 神紋 == 鍬形 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[仲哀天皇]]の時代に創建されたと伝わり、後に鞆結郷（[[鞆結荘]]）の[[惣社]]と崇められた。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに式内社に比定されるが、これまたともに他の論社が存在する。 [[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）郷社に列した。 == 祭祀 == === 神事 === * [[例祭]] - [[4月19日]] === 社家 === * 浦氏 == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:ともゆいしんしや}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:郷社]] {{Shinto-stub}}

（鞆結神社）誉田別命 |社格 = 式内社論社・旧郷社 |創建 = 伝仲哀天皇朝 |本殿 = [[流造|三間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月19日 |神事 = }} '''鞆結神社・大荒比古神社'''（ともゆいじんじゃ・おおあらひこじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町浦に鎮座する[[神社]]である。大荒比古神社と鞆結神社の2神社が併記の形で[[合祀]]されているが、ともに[[式内社]]の[[論社]]とされる。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。 == 祭神 == ;大荒比古神社 :*[[豊城入彦命]] :*[[大荒田別命]] :*[[大己貴命]] :*[[須勢理姫命]] :*配祀神 [[須佐男命]]・[[菅原道真公]] ;鞆結神社 :*[[誉田別命]] == 神紋 == 鍬形 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[仲哀天皇]]の時代に創建されたと伝わり、後に鞆結郷（[[鞆結荘]]）の[[惣社]]と崇められた。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに式内社に比定されるが、これまたともに他の論社が存在する。 [[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）郷社に列した。 == 祭祀 == === 神事 === * [[例祭]] - [[4月19日]] === 社家 === * 浦氏 == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:ともゆいしんしや}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:郷社]] {{Shinto-stub}}

revision.comment: 「[[鞆結神社・大荒比古神社]]」を「[[大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]]」へ移動: 提案後1週間で異論なきため
revision.text:
{{改名提案|[[大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]]|date=2010年2月}} {{神社 |名称 = 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:T-tomoyui-jinja.JPG|center|250px]]本殿（奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = 滋賀県高島市マキノ町浦627 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|23.1|N|136|03|40.9|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = （大荒比古神社）豊城入彦命・大荒田別命 外
（鞆結神社）誉田別命 |社格 = 式内社論社・旧郷社 |創建 = 伝仲哀天皇朝 |本殿 = [[流造|三間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月19日 |神事 = }} '''鞆結神社・大荒比古神社'''（ともゆいじんじゃ・おおあらひこじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町浦に鎮座する[[神社]]である。大荒比古神社と鞆結神社の2神社が併記の形で[[合祀]]されているが、ともに[[式内社]]の[[論社]]とされる。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。 == 祭神 == ;大荒比古神社 :*[[豊城入彦命]] :*[[大荒田別命]] :*[[大己貴命]] :*[[須勢理姫命]] :*配祀神 [[須佐男命]]・[[菅原道真公]] ;鞆結神社 :*[[誉田別命]] == 神紋 == 鍬形 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[仲哀天皇]]の時代に創建されたと伝わり、後に鞆結郷（[[鞆結荘]]）の[[惣社]]と崇められた。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに式内社に比定されるが、これまたともに他の論社が存在する。 [[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）郷社に列した。 == 祭祀 == === 神事 === * [[例祭]] - [[4月19日]] === 社家 === * 浦氏 == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:ともゆいしんしや}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:郷社]] {{Shinto-stub}}

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine'''|大荒比古神社・鞆結神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

revision.text:
{{出典の明記|date=2023年1月1日 (日) 13:23 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:T-tomoyui-jinja.JPG|center|270px]]本殿（奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = [[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町浦627 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|23.1|N|136|03|40.9|E|display=ti}} |祭神 = （大荒比古神社）豊城入彦命・大荒田別命 外
（鞆結神社）誉田別命 |社格 = [[式内社]]論社・旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 伝・[[仲哀天皇]]朝 |本殿 = [[流造|三間社流造]] |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月19日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=大荒比古
神社
・鞆結神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''大荒比古神社・鞆結神社'''（おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町浦に鎮座する[[神社]]である。大荒比古神社と鞆結神社の2神社が併記の形で[[合祀]]されているが、ともに[[式内社]]の[[論社]]とされる。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。 == 祭神 == ;大荒比古神社 :*[[豊城入彦命]] :*[[大荒田別命]] :*[[大己貴命]] :*[[須勢理姫命]] :*配祀神 [[須佐男命]]・[[菅原道真公]] ;鞆結神社 :*[[誉田別命]] == 神紋 == 鍬形 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[仲哀天皇]]の時代に創建されたと伝わり、後に鞆結郷（[[鞆結荘]]）の[[惣社]]と崇められた。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに式内社に比定されるが、これまたともに他の論社が存在する。 [[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）郷社に列した。 == 祭祀 == === 神事 === * [[例祭]] - [[4月19日]] === 社家 === * 浦氏 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] {{Shinto-stub}}

・鞆結神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''大荒比古神社・鞆結神社'''（おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ）は、[[滋賀県]][[高島市]]マキノ町浦に鎮座する[[神社]]である。大荒比古神社と鞆結神社の2神社が併記の形で[[合祀]]されているが、ともに[[式内社]]の[[論社]]とされる。[[旧社格]]は[[郷社]]。 == 祭神 == ;大荒比古神社 :*[[豊城入彦命]] :*[[大荒田別命]] :*[[大己貴命]] :*[[須勢理姫命]] :*配祀神 [[須佐男命]]・[[菅原道真公]] ;鞆結神社 :*[[誉田別命]] == 神紋 == 鍬形 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、[[仲哀天皇]]の時代に創建されたと伝わり、後に鞆結郷（[[鞆結荘]]）の[[惣社]]と崇められた。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに式内社に比定されるが、これまたともに他の論社が存在する。 [[明治]]9年（[[1876年]]）郷社に列した。 == 祭祀 == === 神事 === * [[例祭]] - [[4月19日]] === 社家 === * 浦氏 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese==

・鞆結神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''大荒比古神社・鞆結神社'''（おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}マキノ町浦に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。大荒比古神社と鞆結神社の2神社が併記の形で{{jalink|合祀|Q11412524}}されているが、ともに{{jalink|式内社}}の{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}とされる。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|郷社}}。 == 祭神 == ;大荒比古神社 :*{{jalink|豊城入彦命|Q11633375}} :*{{jalink|大荒田別命}} :*{{jalink|大己貴命}} :*{{jalink|須勢理姫命}} :*配祀神 {{jalink|須佐男命}}・{{jalink|菅原道真公}} ;鞆結神社 :*{{jalink|誉田別命}} == 神紋 == 鍬形 == 歴史 == 社伝によると、{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}の時代に創建されたと伝わり、後に鞆結郷（{{jalink|鞆結荘}}）の{{jalink|惣社}}と崇められた。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに式内社に比定されるが、これまたともに他の論社が存在する。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）郷社に列した。 == 祭祀 == === 神事 === * {{jalink|例祭|Q11385469}} - {{jalink|4月19日|Q2523}} === 社家 === * 浦氏 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]]

It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|lt=Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|lt=nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|fr|Nagare-zukuri|it|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|pl|Nagare-zukuri|ru|Нагарэ-дзукури|sv|Nagare-zukuri|zh|流造|WD=Q210684}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|lt=Q17|WD=Q17}} == name in kana (P1814) == * おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4160005007566 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039882|lt=Q135039882|WD=Q135039882}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市マキノ町浦627', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '滋賀県高島市新旭町安井川', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438676}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2023年1月1日 (日) 13:23 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:T-tomoyui-jinja.JPG|center|270px]]本殿（奥）と拝殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}マキノ町浦627 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|23.1|N|136|03|40.9|E|display=ti}} |祭神 = （大荒比古神社）豊城入彦命・大荒田別命 外
（鞆結神社）誉田別命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社・旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}朝 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|三間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月19日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=大荒比古
神社
・鞆結神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''大荒比古神社・鞆結神社'''（おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}マキノ町浦に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。大荒比古神社と鞆結神社の2神社が併記の形で{{jalink|合祀|Q11412524}}されているが、ともに{{jalink|式内社}}の{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}とされる。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 === 祭神 === ;大荒比古神社 :*{{jalink|豊城入彦命|Q11633375}} :*{{jalink|大荒田別命}} :*{{jalink|大己貴命}} :*{{jalink|須勢理姫命}} :*配祀神 {{jalink|須佐男命}}・{{jalink|菅原道真公}} ;鞆結神社 :*{{jalink|誉田別命}} === 神紋 === 鍬形 === 歴史 === 社伝によると、{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}の時代に創建されたと伝わり、後に鞆結郷（{{jalink|鞆結荘}}）の{{jalink|惣社}}と崇められた。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに式内社に比定されるが、これまたともに他の論社が存在する。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）郷社に列した。 === 祭祀 === === 神事 === * {{jalink|例祭|Q11385469}} - {{jalink|4月19日|Q2523}} === 社家 === * 浦氏 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

（鞆結神社）誉田別命 |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社・旧{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}} |創建 = 伝・{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}朝 |本殿 = {{jalink|流造|Q210684|三間社流造}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 4月19日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=大荒比古
神社
・鞆結神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''大荒比古神社・鞆結神社'''（おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|滋賀県|Q131358}}{{jalink|高島市|Q845794}}マキノ町浦に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}である。大荒比古神社と鞆結神社の2神社が併記の形で{{jalink|合祀|Q11412524}}されているが、ともに{{jalink|式内社}}の{{jalink|論社|Q135022904}}とされる。{{jalink|旧社格}}は{{jalink|郷社|Q134917316}}。 === 祭神 === ;大荒比古神社 :*{{jalink|豊城入彦命|Q11633375}} :*{{jalink|大荒田別命}} :*{{jalink|大己貴命}} :*{{jalink|須勢理姫命}} :*配祀神 {{jalink|須佐男命}}・{{jalink|菅原道真公}} ;鞆結神社 :*{{jalink|誉田別命}} === 神紋 === 鍬形 === 歴史 === 社伝によると、{{jalink|仲哀天皇|Q179971}}の時代に創建されたと伝わり、後に鞆結郷（{{jalink|鞆結荘}}）の{{jalink|惣社}}と崇められた。鞆結神社、大荒比古神社ともに式内社に比定されるが、これまたともに他の論社が存在する。 {{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}9年（{{jalink|1876年|Q7766}}）郷社に列した。 === 祭祀 === === 神事 === * {{jalink|例祭|Q11385469}} - {{jalink|4月19日|Q2523}} === 社家 === * 浦氏 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

{'text': '滋賀県高島市新旭町安井川', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:大荒比古神社・鞆結神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11438676}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=1 January 2023 (Sun) 13:23 (UTC)}} {{神社 |名称 = Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:T-tomoyui-jinja.JPG|center|270px]]Main sanctuary (rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}{{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}} Makino-chō Ura 627 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|23.1|N|136|03|40.9|E|display=ti}} |祭神 = (Ōarahiko Shrine) Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto, Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto, others
(Tomoyui Shrine) Homudawake-no-Mikoto |社格 = candidate {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} / former {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}} |創建 = tradition: reign of {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}} |本殿 = {{jalink|nagare-zukuri|Q210684|three-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = April 19 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōarahiko
Shrine
・Tomoyui Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine''' (おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} complex in Ura, Makino-chō, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Two shrines are jointly enshrined in one listing, and both are treated as candidate shrines for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}. Former shrine rank: {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{jalink|Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375}} :*{{jalink|Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Suserihime-no-Mikoto}} :*Associated deities: {{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} / {{jalink|Sugawara no Michizane}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{jalink|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}}, and later revered as the {{jalink|sōsha}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Both Tomoyui Shrine and Ōarahiko Shrine are identified as Shikinaisha, and both have other candidate shrines. In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as gōsha. === Rituals === === Rite === * {{jalink|Annual festival|Q11385469}} - {{jalink|April 19|Q2523}} === Shrine family === * Ura clan === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

revision.comment: AI-assisted translation: Japanese wiki content translated by local AI agents (deepseek-r1:8b via Ollama, reviewed/assembled by Claude Code). Quality varies — some pages may contain subtle translation errors.

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: used local AI agents to translate these pages. Contrary to the description it was actually Claude Code for a few, OpenClaw with Codex, and regular Codex. Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

・Tomoyui Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine''' (おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} complex in Ura, Makino-chō, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Two shrines are jointly enshrined in one listing, and both are treated as candidate shrines for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}. Former shrine rank: {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{jalink|Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375}} :*{{jalink|Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Suserihime-no-Mikoto}} :*Associated deities: {{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} / {{jalink|Sugawara no Michizane}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{jalink|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}}, and later revered as the {{jalink|sōsha}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Both Tomoyui Shrine and Ōarahiko Shrine are identified as Shikinaisha, and both have other candidate shrines. In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as gōsha. === Rituals === === Rite === * {{jalink|Annual festival|Q11385469}} - {{jalink|April 19|Q2523}} === Shrine family === * Ura clan === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Shrine
・Tomoyui Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine''' (おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} complex in Ura, Makino-chō, {{jalink|Takashima, Shiga|Q845794}}, {{jalink|Shiga Prefecture|Q131358}}. Two shrines are jointly enshrined in one listing, and both are treated as candidate shrines for {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}. Former shrine rank: {{jalink|Gōsha|Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{jalink|Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375}} :*{{jalink|Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto}} :*{{jalink|Suserihime-no-Mikoto}} :*Associated deities: {{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} / {{jalink|Sugawara no Michizane}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{jalink|Homudawake-no-Mikoto}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{jalink|Emperor Chūai|Q179971}}, and later revered as the {{jalink|sōsha}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Both Tomoyui Shrine and Ōarahiko Shrine are identified as Shikinaisha, and both have other candidate shrines. In {{jalink|1876|Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as gōsha. === Rituals === === Rite === * {{jalink|Annual festival|Q11385469}} - {{jalink|April 19|Q2523}} === Shrine family === * Ura clan === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]]

Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:T-tomoyui-jinja.JPG|center|270px]]Main sanctuary (rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}} Makino-chō Ura 627 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|23.1|N|136|03|40.9|E|display=ti}} |祭神 = (Ōarahiko Shrine) Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto, Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto, others
(Tomoyui Shrine) Homudawake-no-Mikoto |社格 = candidate {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} / former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = tradition: reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}} |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=three-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = April 19 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōarahiko
Shrine
・Tomoyui Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine''' (おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} complex in Ura, Makino-chō, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. Two shrines are jointly enshrined in one listing, and both are treated as candidate shrines for {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}}. Former shrine rank: {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{ill|lt=Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375|WD=Q11633375}} :*{{ill||lt=Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} :*{{ill||lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} :*{{ill||lt=Suserihime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} :*Associated deities: {{ill||lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} / {{ill||lt=Sugawara no Michizane|UNKNOWN}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{ill||lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}}, and later revered as the {{ill||lt=sōsha|UNKNOWN}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Both Tomoyui Shrine and Ōarahiko Shrine are identified as Shikinaisha, and both have other candidate shrines. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as gōsha. === Rituals === === Rite === * {{ill|lt=Annual festival|Q11385469|WD=Q11385469}} - {{ill|lt=April 19|Q2523|WD=Q2523}} === Shrine family === * Ura clan === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Shrine
・Tomoyui Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine''' (おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} complex in Ura, Makino-chō, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. Two shrines are jointly enshrined in one listing, and both are treated as candidate shrines for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}}. Former shrine rank: {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{ill|lt=Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375|WD=Q11633375}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Suserihime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*Associated deities: {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=UNKNOWN}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}}, and later revered as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=sōsha|1=UNKNOWN}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Both Tomoyui Shrine and Ōarahiko Shrine are identified as Shikinaisha, and both have other candidate shrines. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as gōsha. === Rituals === === Rite === * {{ill|lt=Annual festival|Q11385469|WD=Q11385469}} - {{ill|lt=April 19|Q2523|WD=Q2523}} === Shrine family === * Ura clan === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:T-tomoyui-jinja.JPG|center|270px]]Main sanctuary (rear) and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}} Makino-chō Ura 627 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|29|23.1|N|136|03|40.9|E|display=ti}} |祭神 = (Ōarahiko Shrine) Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto, Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto, others
(Tomoyui Shrine) Homudawake-no-Mikoto |社格 = candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}} |創建 = tradition: reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}} |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=three-bay nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = April 19 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōarahiko
Shrine
・Tomoyui Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine''' (おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} complex in Ura, Makino-chō, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358}}. Two shrines are jointly enshrined in one listing, and both are treated as candidate shrines for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}}. Former shrine rank: {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{ill|lt=Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375|WD=Q11633375}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*{{ill|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q276944}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Suserihime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*Associated deities: {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=UNKNOWN}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971}}, and later revered as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=sōsha|1=UNKNOWN}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Both Tomoyui Shrine and Ōarahiko Shrine are identified as Shikinaisha, and both have other candidate shrines. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as gōsha. === Rituals === === Rite === * {{ill|lt=Annual festival|Q11385469|WD=Q11385469}} - {{ill|lt=April 19|Q2523|WD=Q2523}} === Shrine family === * Ura clan === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Former shrine rank: {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{ill|lt=Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375|WD=Q11633375|1=Prince Toyokiirihiko}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*{{ill|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Suserihime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*Associated deities: {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=UNKNOWN}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}}, and later revered as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=sōsha|1=UNKNOWN}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Two shrines are jointly enshrined in one listing, and both are treated as candidate shrines for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Former shrine rank: {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{ill|lt=Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375|WD=Q11633375|1=Prince Toyokiirihiko}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*{{ill|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Suserihime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*Associated deities: {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=UNKNOWN}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}}, and later revered as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=sōsha|1=UNKNOWN}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Both Tomoyui Shrine and Ōarahiko Shrine are identified as Shikinaisha, and both have other candidate shrines. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as gōsha. === Rituals === === Rite === * {{ill|lt=Annual festival|Q11385469|WD=Q11385469|1=Reisai}} - {{ill|lt=April 19|Q2523|WD=Q2523|1=April 19}} === Shrine family === * Ura clan === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{DEFAULTSORT:おおあらひこしんしやともゆいしんしや}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:高島市の神社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto, Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto, others
(Tomoyui Shrine) Homudawake-no-Mikoto |社格 = candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = tradition: reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}} |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=three-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = April 19 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōarahiko
Shrine
・Tomoyui Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine''' (おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} complex in Ura, Makino-chō, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Two shrines are jointly enshrined in one listing, and both are treated as candidate shrines for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Former shrine rank: {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{ill|lt=Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375|WD=Q11633375|1=Prince Toyokiirihiko}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*{{ill|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Suserihime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*Associated deities: {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=UNKNOWN}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}}, and later revered as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=sōsha|1=UNKNOWN}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Both Tomoyui Shrine and Ōarahiko Shrine are identified as Shikinaisha, and both have other candidate shrines. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as gōsha. === Rituals === === Rite === * {{ill|lt=Annual festival|Q11385469|WD=Q11385469|1=Reisai}} - {{ill|lt=April 19|Q2523|WD=Q2523|1=April 19}} === Shrine family === * Ura clan === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Takashima, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

(Tomoyui Shrine) Homudawake-no-Mikoto |社格 = candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = tradition: reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}} |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|WD=Q210684|lt=three-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = April 19 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Ōarahiko
Shrine
・Tomoyui Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine''' (おおあらひこじんじゃ・ともゆいじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} complex in Ura, Makino-chō, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|WD=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|WD=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. Two shrines are jointly enshrined in one listing, and both are treated as candidate shrines for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}. Former shrine rank: {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|WD=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === ;Ōarahiko Shrine :*{{ill|lt=Toyoki-iribiko-no-Mikoto|Q11633375|WD=Q11633375|1=Prince Toyokiirihiko}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōaratawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*{{ill|Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ōnamuchi-no-Mikoto|WD=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Suserihime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} :*Associated deities: {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} / {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=UNKNOWN}} ;Tomoyui Shrine :*{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Homudawake-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === Kuwagata === History === According to shrine tradition, it was founded in the reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Chūai|Q179971|WD=Q179971|1=Emperor Chūai}}, and later revered as the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=sōsha|1=UNKNOWN}} of Tomoyui-go (Tomoyui-shō). Both Tomoyui Shrine and Ōarahiko Shrine are identified as Shikinaisha, and both have other candidate shrines. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|WD=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as gōsha. === Rituals === === Rite === * {{ill|lt=Annual festival|Q11385469|WD=Q11385469|1=Reisai}} - {{ill|lt=April 19|Q2523|WD=Q2523|1=April 19}} === Shrine family === * Ura clan === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1311 Ōarahiko Shrine / Tomoyui Shrine]（Shiga Prefectural Shrine Office） {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōarahiko Shrine, Tomoyui Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Takashima, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]]
